name: Strings and Length
description: Definition of the set of all strings of elements of C and the string length function LTH.

elements.text: STRINGS(C) = {f: f = ∅ or f ∈ FNS(IJS[0, n), C) for some n ∈ IJS+} (set of finite sequences).
LTH(f) = 0 if f = ∅; LTH(f) = n if f ∈ FNS(IJS[0, n), C) for some n ∈ IJS+.
